member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.EqualPanel
member.summary: A panel that arranges its children in equal columns.

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.EqualPanel.Spacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the spacing between items.

member.name: F:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.EqualPanel.SpacingProperty
member.summary: Identifies the Spacing dependency property.
member.returns: The identifier for the dependency property.

member.name: M:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.EqualPanel.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Native constructor, do not use explicitly.
member.remarks: Used by the Xamarin Runtime to materialize native objects that may have been collected in the managed world.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.SegmentedMarginConverter
member.summary: A converter that returns a margin based on the position of the item in a segmented control.

member.name: F:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.SegmentedMarginConverter.LeftItemMarginProperty
member.summary: Identifies the property.

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.SegmentedMarginConverter.LeftItemMargin
member.summary: Gets or sets the margin of the first item

member.name: F:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.SegmentedMarginConverter.MiddleItemMarginProperty
member.summary: Identifies the property.

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.SegmentedMarginConverter.MiddleItemMargin
member.summary: Gets or sets the margin of any middle item

member.name: F:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.SegmentedMarginConverter.RightItemMarginProperty
member.summary: Identifies the property.

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.SegmentedMarginConverter.RightItemMargin
member.summary: Gets or sets the margin of the last item

member.name: M:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.SegmentedMarginConverter.ClearBindings
member.summary: Obsolete method kept for binary compatibility

member.name: M:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.SegmentedMarginConverter.RestoreBindings
member.summary: Obsolete method kept for binary compatibility

member.summary: Represents an item in a control.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.Segmented
member.summary: A control that displays a set of items that can be selected by the user.

member.name: M:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.Segmented.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance of .

member.name: M:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.Segmented.MoveFocus(CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls.Segmented.MoveDirection)
member.summary: Adjust the selected item and range based on keyboard input. This is used to override the ListView behaviors for up/down arrow manipulation vs left/right for a horizontal control
member.returns: True if the focus was moved, false otherwise

member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.summary: Contains all the static resources defined for the application
